title: Pan Aroma® AIR FRESHENER REED DIFFUSER, RED BERRY, 50ml
features: WELCOMING HOME FRAGRANCE: Pan Aroma Reed Diffuser, gently diffuses a wonderful Red Berry warm & cosy fragrance creating a welcoming scent to any room in the home.
CONTINUOUS WARM & COSY FRAGRANCE: Pan Aroma Reed Diffusers naturally diffuse fragrance in the home for up to 4 weeks
ADJUST FRAGRANCE STRENGTH: Unscrew the wooden collar, remove the plastic stopper, choose the number of reeds to suit personal fragrance for maximum fragrnace insert all supplied reeds
INSTANT FRAGRANCE BURST: An elegant & effective way to instantly add a burst of fragrance to any room, place in hallways, living areas and bathrooms
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Scent, Red Berry. 4 Reed Stems, Volume 50ml
description: PAN AROMA is a market leading supplier of everything you need to make your home wonderfully fragranced. From tea lights, candles, reed diffusers, plug ins and home air fresheners, Pan Aroma has everything you need to add instant long lasting fragrance to any room in the home. The Pan Aroma Reed Diffuser, gently diffuses a wonderful Red Berry warm & cosy fragrance naturally in the home for up to 4 weeks. Elegant adn effective way to instantly add a burst of fragrance to any room, place in hallways, living areas and bathrooms. Red Berry. 4 Reed Stems, Volume 50ml
